record.field: <form class="o_account_move_send_wizard"><field name="move_id" invisible="1"/><field name="alerts" invisible="not alerts"/><field name="sending_method_checkboxes"/><field name="extra_edi_checkboxes"/><field name="model" invisible="1"/><field name="res_ids" invisible="1"/><field name="render_model" invisible="1"/><group><field name="mail_partner_ids"/><field name="subject"/><field name="body"/></group><field name="mail_attachments_widget"/><footer><button string="Send" name="action_send_and_print" type="object" class="btn-primary"/><button string="Discard" special="cancel" class="btn-secondary"/><field name="template_id"/></footer></form>

<form><field name="move_ids" invisible="1"/><field name="alerts" invisible="not alerts"/><field name="summary_data"/><footer><button string="Send" name="action_send_and_print" type="object" class="btn-primary"/><button string="Cancel" special="cancel" class="btn-secondary"/></footer></form>
